name: video_download
description: Download a video from a URL using yt-dlp

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of the video to download

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Path where the downloaded video will be saved

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Video format or yt-dlp format selector (e.g. 'mp4', 'best', 'bestvideo+bestaudio')
